Always Something Happening

Upcoming Events

Stay connected with what's happening in our community. From cleanups to workshops — there's a place for everyone.

Scroll
What's Coming Up

Mark Your Calendar

All events are free and open to the public unless otherwise noted. Click any event to see full details and get directions.

🍂
⭐ Next Up

Community Cleanup Drive

Join neighbors, volunteers, and local organizations for a city-wide cleanup. We'll provide all supplies — just bring your energy and enthusiasm!

📅 November 10, 2025🕐 10:00 AM — 1:00 PM📍 Bothell Landing Park👥 All Ages Welcome
🍂
10
Nov
volunteer

Community Cleanup Drive

Join us for a community-wide cleanup event. We'll provide gloves, bags, and light refreshments. Meet at the south entrance of Bothell Landing Park.

🕐 10:00 AM — 1:00 PM
📍 Bothell Landing Park, South Entrance
✉️ events@communityconnect.org
👶 All ages, families welcomeDetails →
💻
22
Nov
education

STEM Mentorship Workshop

A workshop for students interested in STEM careers, featuring guest speakers from local universities and hands-on breakout sessions.

🕐 4:00 PM — 6:30 PM
📍 Bothell Regional Library, Room 2B
✉️ events@communityconnect.org
👶 Students ages 12 and upDetails →
🍽️
5
Dec
donation

Holiday Food Drive

Help us collect non-perishable food items for families in need this holiday season. Suggested donations: canned vegetables, rice, pasta.

🕐 9:00 AM — 4:00 PM
📍 Bothell Community Center, Main Hall
✉️ events@communityconnect.org
👶 All community membersDetails →
🍽️
19
Dec
donation

Winter Clothing Donation

Donate warm coats, hats, gloves, scarves, and blankets. All items will be checked for quality and distributed to local shelters.

🕐 10:00 AM — 3:00 PM
📍 Bothell City Hall, Front Lobby
✉️ events@communityconnect.org
👶 All agesDetails →

Event Locations

All events take place at accessible community spaces. Click a location below to get directions.

Room 2B, Main Branch Nov 22 — STEM Workshop

Main Hall Dec 5 — Food Drive

Bothell City Hall
Front Lobby Dec 19 — Clothing Drive
